en.hotel_description:
The former guesthouse of Emperor Francis Joseph, this hotel is within a 10-minute walk of Schönbrunn Palace and the Vienna Zoo. It offers an elegant restaurant and a private garden, and free WiFi access is available.

The restaurant at Austria Trend Parkhotel Schönbrunn Wien serves classic Austrian cuisine and Viennese specialities in a historic ambiance. In the evening, the Gloriette Bar offers a wide range of drinks.

The spacious an air-conditioned rooms combine modern facilities with a traditional elegant ambiance. They include a cable TV, a minibar and a safe.

The Hietzing Underground Station is just 50 metres away from Parkhotel Schönbrunn and provides direct connections to Vienna’s city centre within 15 minutes. A parking garage is available on site at an additional cost.

Since November 2014, the Parkhotel Schönbrunn is holder of the Austrian Ecolabel for Tourism due to various sustainability measures initiated by the hotel.

de.hotel_description:
Das ehemalige Gästehaus von Kaiser Franz Joseph liegt nur 10 Gehminuten von Schloss Schönbrunn und dem Wiener Zoo entfernt. Zu diesem Hotel gehören ein elegantes Restaurant und ein eigener Garten. WLAN steht kostenlos zur Verfügung.

Im Restaurant im Austria Trend Parkhotel Schönbrunn Wien werden Ihnen klassische Gerichte der österreichischen Küche und Wiener Spezialitäten in historischem Ambiente serviert. Eine große Auswahl an Getränken erwartet Sie abends in der Bar Gloriette.

In den geräumigen und klimatisierten Zimmer erwartet Sie eine Kombination aus moderner Einrichtung und einem traditionellen, eleganten Ambiente. Die Zimmer verfügen über einen TV mit Kabelkanälen, eine Minibar und einen Safe.

Die U-Bahn-Station Hietzing, von der Sie das Wiener Stadtzentrum per Direktverbindung innerhalb von 15 Minuten erreichen, befindet sich nur 50 m vom Parkhotel Schönbrunn entfernt. Gegen einen Aufpreis können Sie auch die Parkgarage an der Unterkunft nutzen.

Das Parkhotel Schönbrunn hat verschiedene Nachhaltigkeitsmaßnahmen umgesetzt und ist daher seit November 2014 mit dem Österreichischen Umweltzeichen für Tourismus ausgezeichnet.

The former guesthouse of Emperor Francis Joseph, this hotel is within a 10-minute walk of Schönbrunn Palace and the Vienna Zoo. It offers an elegant restaurant and a private garden, and free WiFi access is available.

The restaurant at Austria Trend Parkhotel Schönbrunn Wien serves classic Austrian cuisine and Viennese specialities in a historic ambiance. In the evening, the Gloriette Bar offers a wide range of drinks.

The Hietzing Underground Station is just 50 metres away from Parkhotel Schönbrunn and provides direct connections to Vienna’s city centre within 15 minutes. A parking garage is available on site at an additional cost.

Since November 2014, the Parkhotel Schönbrunn is holder of the Austrian Ecolabel for Tourism due to various sustainability measures initiated by the hotel.

ko.hotel_description:
이 호텔은 과거 프란츠 요제프 황제의 영빈관이었던 곳으로, 쇤브룬 궁전과 비엔나 동물원에서 도보로 10분 거리에 있습니다. 이 호텔은 우아한 레스토랑과 전용 정원을 보유하고 있으며, 무료 Wi-Fi를 제공합니다.

오스트리아 트렌드 파크호텔 쇤브룬 빈의 레스토랑은 역사적인 분위기 속에서 고전적인 오스트리아 요리와 비엔나 특선 요리를 제공합니다. 저녁에는 글로리에트 바에서 다양한 음료를 즐기실 수 있습니다.

넓고 에어컨이 완비된 객실은 현대적인 시설과 전통적이고 우아한 분위기가 조화를 이루고 있습니다. 케이블 TV, 미니바, 금고 등이 제공됩니다.

히칭 지하철역은 파크호텔 쇤브룬에서 단 50m 떨어져 있으며, 15분 이내에 비엔나 시내 중심가까지 직행 노선을 제공합니다. 추가 비용으로 구내 주차장을 이용하실 수 있습니다.

2014년 11월, 파크호텔 쇤브룬은 호텔이 시행한 다양한 지속 가능성 조치로 인해 관광 부문에서 오스트리아 에코라벨을 획득했습니다.

hu.hotel_description:
The former guesthouse of Emperor Francis Joseph, this hotel is within a 10-minute walk of Schönbrunn Palace and the Vienna Zoo. It offers an elegant restaurant and a private garden, and free WiFi access is available.

The restaurant at Austria Trend Parkhotel Schönbrunn Wien serves classic Austrian cuisine and Viennese specialities in a historic ambiance. In the evening, the Gloriette Bar offers a wide range of drinks.

The spacious an air-conditioned rooms combine modern facilities with a traditional elegant ambiance. They include a cable TV, a minibar and a safe.

The Hietzing Underground Station is just 50 metres away from Parkhotel Schönbrunn and provides direct connections to Vienna’s city centre within 15 minutes. A parking garage is available on site at an additional cost.

Since November 2014, the Parkhotel Schönbrunn is holder of the Austrian Ecolabel for Tourism due to various sustainability measures initiated by the hotel.

pl.hotel_description:
Ten hotel, będący dawnym pensjonatem cesarza Franciszka Józefa, znajduje się 10 minut spacerem od Pałacu Schönbrunn i wiedeńskiego ogrodu zoologicznego. Obiekt oferuje elegancką restaurację i prywatny ogród. Goście mogą korzystać z bezpłatnego WiFi.

Restauracja w Austria Trend Parkhotel Schönbrunn Wien serwuje klasyczne dania kuchni austriackiej i wiedeńskie specjały w zabytkowym otoczeniu. Wieczorem Gloriette Bar oferuje szeroki wybór drinków.

Przestronne i klimatyzowane pokoje łączą w sobie nowoczesne udogodnienia z tradycyjną elegancją. W każdym pokoju znajduje się telewizor z dostępem do kanałów telewizji kablowej, minibar i sejf.

Stacja metra Hietzing znajduje się zaledwie 50 metrów od Parkhotel Schönbrunn i zapewnia bezpośrednie połączenie do centrum Wiednia w ciągu 15 minut. Na miejscu dostępny jest parking w garażu, za dodatkową opłatą.

Od listopada 2014 r. Parkhotel Schönbrunn posiada Austriacki Certyfikat Ekologiczny dla Turystyki dzięki różnorodnym działaniom na rzecz zrównoważonego rozwoju podejmowanym przez hotel.

fi.hotel_description:
Tämä hotelli on entinen keisari Frans Joosefin majatalo, ja se sijaitsee 10 minuutin kävelymatkan päässä Schönbrunnin palatsista ja Wienin eläintarhasta. Se tarjoaa tyylikkään ravintolan, yksityisen puutarhan ja ilmaisen Wi-Fi:n.

Austria Trend Parkhotel Schönbrunn Wienin ravintola tarjoilee klassisia itävaltalaisia ruokia ja wieniläisiä erikoisuuksia historiallisessa tunnelmassa. Illalla Gloriette-baarissa on tarjolla laaja valikoima juomia.

Tilavissa ja ilmastoiduissa huoneissa yhdistyvät modernit mukavuudet perinteiseen eleganttiin tunnelmaan. Niissä on kaapeli-tv, minibaari ja tallelokero.

Hietzingin metroasema on vain 50 metrin päässä Parkhotel Schönbrunnista ja tarjoaa suorat yhteydet Wienin keskustaan 15 minuutissa. Pysäköintihalli on käytettävissä paikan päällä lisämaksusta.

Parkhotel Schönbrunn on ollut Itävallan matkailun ympäristömerkin haltija marraskuusta 2014 lähtien hotellin käynnistämien useiden kestävän kehityksen toimenpiteiden ansiosta.

da.hotel_description:
The former guesthouse of Emperor Francis Joseph, this hotel is within a 10-minute walk of Schönbrunn Palace and the Vienna Zoo. It offers an elegant restaurant and a private garden, and free WiFi access is available.

The restaurant at Austria Trend Parkhotel Schönbrunn Wien serves classic Austrian cuisine and Viennese specialities in a historic ambiance. In the evening, the Gloriette Bar offers a wide range of drinks.

The spacious an air-conditioned rooms combine modern facilities with a traditional elegant ambiance. They include a cable TV, a minibar and a safe.

The Hietzing Underground Station is just 50 metres away from Parkhotel Schönbrunn and provides direct connections to Vienna’s city centre within 15 minutes. A parking garage is available on site at an additional cost.

Since November 2014, the Parkhotel Schönbrunn is holder of the Austrian Ecolabel for Tourism due to various sustainability measures initiated by the hotel.
